repos.name: apple/container
repos.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
repos.descriptionZh: 一种在 Mac 上使用轻量级虚拟机创建和运行 Linux 容器的工具。它是用 Swift 编写的，并针对 Apple 芯片进行了优化。

repos.name: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
repos.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
repos.descriptionZh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——以毫秒为单位的平均存储库。 158 种语言，亚毫秒级查询，标记减少 99%。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖性。

repos.name: calesthio/OpenMontage
repos.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
repos.descriptionZh: 世界上第一个开源的代理视频制作系统。 12条管道、52种工具、500+座席技能。将您的人工智能编码助手变成一个完整的视频制作工作室。

repos.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
repos.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
repos.descriptionZh: 让您的人工智能代理有一双能够看到整个互联网的眼睛。阅读和搜索 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书 — 一个 CLI，零 API 费用。

repos.name: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
repos.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
repos.descriptionZh: AI 代理技能可研究 Reddit、X、YouTube、HN、Polymarket 和网络上的任何主题，然后综合得出有根据的摘要

repos.name: iptv-org/iptv
repos.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
repos.descriptionZh: 来自世界各地的公开 IPTV 频道集合

repos.name: phuryn/pm-skills
repos.description: PM Skills Marketplace: 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins — from discovery to strategy, execution, launch, and growth.
repos.descriptionZh: PM 技能市场：100 多种代理技能、命令和插件 - 从发现到策略、执行、启动和增长。

repos.name: lfnovo/open-notebook
repos.description: An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features
repos.descriptionZh: Notebook LM 的开源实现，具有更多灵活性和功能

repos.name: NVIDIA/cosmos
repos.description: NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools that enables developers to build Physical AI for robots, autonomous vehicles, smart infrastructure, and more.
repos.descriptionZh: NVIDIA Cosmos 是一个包含世界模型、数据集和工具的开放平台，使开发人员能够为机器人、自动驾驶车辆、智能基础设施等构建物理 AI。

repos.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
repos.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
repos.descriptionZh: 从 Anthropic 中提取的系统提示 - Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、Claude Code、Claude Design。 OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 思维、GPT 5.5 即时、Codex。 Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash、3.1 Pro、反重力。 xAI - Grok、Cursor、Copilot、VS Code、Perplexity 等。定期更新。
